titleStmt.title: SII 36.270: original edition by P Shanmugam
No. 270. (A.R. No. 270 of 1910.) TIRUVAḌANDAI, CHINGLEPUT TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. On the north base of the central shrine in the Varāha Perumāḷ temple.

summary.p: Gift of a piece of land at Paḍuvūr, by Naṅgai Vaḍugiyār, the wife of Ālaththulāṉ Raṇakēsari for providing sacred food to the image of Varākadēva, installed in the Āḻvār temple of Tiruviḍavandai in Paḍuvūrnāḍu, a subdivision of Āmūrk-kōṭṭam, by the donor. The Nāṭṭār of Paḍuvūr agreed to maintain the grant. The same donor has made provision for another grant for lighting one perpetual lamp during the evening service to Varākadēva in the same temple and the sabhā of Tiruviḍavandai agreed to maintain the lamp.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī kacciyun=tañcaiyuṅ koṇṭa śrī kaṉnaratevarkku yāṇṭu 2 10 Āva
tu Āmūrk koṭṭattup paṭuvūr nāṭṭu tiruviṭavantai Āḻvār śrī varākatevarkku paṭuvūr Ā
lattuḻān Iraṇakecari maṇavāṭṭiyār naṅkai vaṭukiyār Eḻun=taruḷuvicca tevarkku
paṭuvūrk kurukkattip pulattut tanmakīrttiyān ceṟuvum Itaṟkuriya kiṇaṟum Āḻvārkku ni
ccal Orutiruvamutukku vaitta ceṟuvum nārpaṭuvūr Ērikku nīrvilai Aṭṭi can=tirātittavaṟkuḷ
ḷataṉaiyum Iṟaiyum Eṟaiyt tevaiyuṅ kāttuk kuṭuppomānom paṭuvūr nāṭṭom paṭuvūr
Ālattuḻān Iraṇakecari maṇavāṭṭiyār naṅkai vaṭukiyār śrī varākatevarkku
Antiyampoḻutu tirukkāpputtiṟattāl Ivar vaiytta tūṅkutuṭarvile can=ti viḷakku Ēṟṟi
śrīpalimaṭaṅkit tirukkāppu koḷḷumaḷavum Erippippomānom tiruviṭavantai
cavaiyom Ivar vaiytta cantiviḷakku cantirātittavaṟkerippippomānom Itu mu
ṭṭil nicca nāḻi Arici manṟa Iṭ(ṭa)ṭuk kuṭuttom
Digital edition of SII 36.270 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
